backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the IPGT backend with user profiles, IP record registration, and a token ledger supporting transfers and burns, protected by role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing completed features with file targets, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels — primarily covering removal of WIPO/Sovereign IP references and unverified statistics from Home, Whitepaper, and Footer pages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, serving as a build-planning reference for the frontend source tree.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, card, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the IPGT page title, favicon, and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Whitepaper, wrapped in a Layout with a ProfileSetupModal triggered on first login.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the IPGT brand, platform navigation links, a feature list with shield icons, a dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the IPGT logo, nav links, authenticated user display name, and a login/logout button using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for an IP record showing its ID, category badge, title, description, jurisdiction, registration date, and a truncated document hash.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: Displays a modal dialog with full details of an IP record including all metadata fields, the full SHA-256 document hash with a copy button, and an optional file download link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with a shared Header and Footer inside a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Shows a non-dismissible modal form for new users to enter a display name and optional email, then saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: Displays a success modal after IP registration, showing the new IP record ID and the amount of IPGT tokens burned as the registration fee.
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: Fetches and displays IPGT token statistics (user balance, circulating supply, total burned) in either a compact inline layout or a full grid card layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and persisted identity state for Internet Computer authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, token balance/transfer/stats, and IP record queries (fetch, search, filter, register).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the dark navy/gold theme, and utility/component classes including print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: Dashboard page for authenticated users to view their IPGT token balance, network token statistics, and submit token transfers to other principals.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section with background image, a three-step 'How It Works' explainer, and links to the IP registration and database pages.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Searchable, filterable IP record browser with pagination, pre-seeded mock records, and a detail modal; supports filtering by title, category, and jurisdiction.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: Form page for registering new IP records, handling SHA-256 file hashing, balance checks, ExternalBlob upload with progress, and displaying a success modal on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx: Renders the IPGT whitepaper page with a sticky table-of-contents sidebar, smooth-scroll navigation, intersection-observer-based active section tracking, and a print-to-PDF button. Contains all 12 whitepaper sections as static content.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold/charcoal color palettes, Playfair Display and Inter font families, oklch-based design tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 15) for the IP Global Terminal (IPGT) platform, documenting the summary, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features.
